notes: Custom Allocators wave in closure phase. Allocator stub retired: stdlib/core/alloc/ ships 7 Fuse source files (allocator trait, system default, bump reference impl, global override hooks, Vec[T,A] / Box[T,A] / HashMap[K,V,A] collections) with /// doc coverage. Every allocator-aware collection stores alloc: A alongside ptr/len/cap so dealloc always routes to the owning allocator (Rule 6.9). TestAllocatorTrait / TestGlobalAllocator / TestCollectionsInAllocator / TestBumpAllocatorProof cover the structural + runtime-observable contracts. STUBS.md W21 history block appended; WC021 logged using Rule 10.2 template. Fifteenth full wave under Rule 9.5 three-commit discipline: P00 audit (251eaa9), implementation (a24d2a9), PCL (this commit). Next: enter W22 Stdlib Hosted.
